t":"621"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322054619230F1F7617CCCB6C9BDB"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读30小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":107777,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8736},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7288969651799229247","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了好多好多的末世文，还是这位作者大大的末世文合我的胃口，末世主角独善其身，百无禁忌，没有那所谓的冰清玉洁，知道末世里好看又没有实力的女人没有选择命运的权利，照样收了，而且主角有手段又不送女。最重要的是车速相当快，很会玩，我非常喜欢[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697098128,"group_id":"7239220785737370657","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1497984709699053"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7239220785737370657","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.4276145e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":64275,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":98},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7280048277209760566","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者再接再厉，特别喜欢主角在末日的行事风格，不像其他末日文的主角设定一样––冰清玉洁，非chu不收，收弟送女。关键是车速杠杠的，特别是那些表示声音的词“噗”“啵”[你细品][你细品][你细品]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695020064,"group_id":"7239220785737370657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"讨厌反派和小喽啰比主角活得还潇洒的小说，更讨厌送女的小说，呕","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyT78yLGFf1AUv1NuomjueF/TUwrEnFAWWkUCtC9ApUU","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign
